mapper.insert:
insert into trade_order_item (order_id, user_id, spu_id, sku_id, spu_name, sku_pic_url, sku_properties, price, quantity, line_amount) values
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.spuId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.spuName}, #{item.skuPicUrl}, #{item.skuProperties}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.lineAmount})
